Legal information

Privacy Policy

This page explains what data may be collected through analytics or standard site usage.

Analytics

The site may use analytics tools to understand page visits and content usage. No payment or account system is active in the current version.

Contact

If you contact the site by email, the information you send is used only for that communication.

No user account storage

The current site version does not provide public user accounts, subscriptions, or checkout forms, so it does not store that type of account data.

Chopsticks Guide

This site explains chopstick use, materials, etiquette, and cultural context for educational reference. It does not provide medical, nutritional, or product safety guarantees.
